failure_modes.cause: TBAB/EG mixture solidifies if temperature drops below 60°C during operation
failure_modes.mitigation: Install redundant heating zones with independent temperature controllers

failure_modes.cause: Q=0.0589 mL/min below minimum stable flow for most HPLC pumps
failure_modes.mitigation: Use syringe pump or split-flow configuration with recycle loop

failure_modes.cause: Exothermic cycloaddition heat accumulation in long residence time system
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement distributed heating with multiple temperature sensors

single_points_of_failure: DES feed line — crystallization blocks entire system
validation_experiments: Test DES flow stability at Q=0.06 mL/min for 4 hours with temperature cycling 115-125°C
Measure heat generation rate using reaction calorimetry to validate thermal design
Demonstrate pump performance at target flow rate with DES viscosity fluid
